# CWE-349 safe: Acceptance of Extraneous Untrusted Data With Trusted Data (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-349-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
)

type SignedEnvelope struct {
	TrustedChannel bool `json:"trusted_channel"`
	Profile        struct {
		ID   string `json:"id"`
		Role string `json:"role"`
	} `json:"profile"`
}

func ProcessSignedEnvelope(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	var env SignedEnvelope
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&env); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if !env.TrustedChannel {
		return errors.New("untrusted envelope")
	}
	if env.Profile.Role != "support" {
		return errors.New("role not allowed from trusted channel")
	}
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", env.Profile.Role, env.Profile.ID)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
